title: Deltarune Chapter 5 now available with strange route and complete guides
summary: Chapter 5 introduces a dark route with terrifying scenes and is available on Switch alongside multiple guides.

title: GTA 6 will not have a physical version, according to multiple reports
summary: Rockstar rules out launching GTA 6 on disc at launch or months after, contradicting previous rumors.

title: Sony insists on games as a service despite failures and layoffs
summary: The company reaffirms its commitment to live-service on PS5 and PC despite criticism and cuts.

title: Weekend recommendations: what to play according to major outlets
summary: Eurogamer, Rock Paper Shotgun, and Nintendo Life share their game suggestions for the weekend.

title: Lenovo warns that high RAM prices could be the new normal
summary: The company points out that the RAM memory price crisis may not reverse, according to analysts.

title: Riot Games confirms League of Legends Classic and will reveal it in two weeks
summary: The classic mode of the popular MOBA will be announced soon after official teasers.

title: Steam Summer Sale offers games with up to 90% off
summary: PCGamer and 3DJuegos highlight the best deals on Valve's platform during the summer promotion.

title: Avatar Legends: The Fighting Game reveals Year 1 Pass characters
summary: Bolin, Ty Lee, Lin Beifong, and Uncle Iroh will join the roster during the first year of content.

title: Valve sends Steam Machine reservation emails with a view to its launch in 2026
summary: Pre-orders for Valve's console are already underway after confirmation emails sent to interested parties.

title: Quantic Dream developers warn that Star Wars Eclipse is in danger with layoffs
summary: Striking employees assure that the project cannot be completed if the personnel cuts are carried out.

title: PlayStation 5 sales fall to their lowest level in 25 years
summary: The high price of the console causes a collapse in sales, according to data from Sony and analysts.

title: Xbox and Sony compete for players' attention ahead of GTA 6 launch
summary: Xbox responds to claims of greater interest in PlayStation while Sony gives special treatment to the game.

title: Nintendo surprises with good news: Switch 2 achieves strong sales in the United States
summary: In contrast to the sector crisis, Nintendo announces solid performance of its new console in the first year.

title: Sony will remove 550 movies from PlayStation and users will lose access
summary: The company will remove purchased content from digital libraries, generating criticism about digital ownership.

title: Mark Zuckerberg plans to launch his own betting app to compete with Polymarket
summary: The CEO of Meta seeks to enter the decentralized predictions market with a new platform.

title: A24 faces criticism for its partnership with Google AI and defends the collaboration
summary: Fans of the independent production company express their displeasure at the controversial alliance with artificial intelligence.

title: Microsoft extends Windows 10 security updates until 2027
summary: The operating system will receive an additional year of support, relieving users who did not migrate to Windows 11.

title: Bungie delays the last planned patch of Destiny 2 after mass layoffs
summary: The update schedule is affected by personnel cuts while major bugs persist.

title: Arrowhead delays the new Helldivers 2 Warbond to polish it after progress overhaul
summary: The studio needs more time for the content after a massive overhaul of the progression system.

title: Bohemia Interactive announces Operation Flashpoint remaster and releases engine source code
summary: The classic tactical game returns with an improved version and the studio opens its technology to the community.
